Inquire About Booking
🏆 College Football Hall of Fame

Why David

WHY AUDIENCES CONNECT WITH DAVID

David Pollack isn't a motivational speaker who memorized a script. He's someone who has lived through the highest highs and most gut-wrenching lows — and come out the other side with something real to say. From three-time All-American to career-ending injury to 12 years in front of a national television audience, his credibility walks in the room before he does.

Every speech is custom-crafted for the audience. Whether he's firing up a corporate sales team, speaking at a faith-based event, or emceeing a gala, David reads the room and delivers something memorable. His combination of energy, authenticity, humor, and purpose is rare — and rooms feel it.

Topics

SIGNATURE KEYNOTE TOPICS

Every presentation is tailored to your audience and objectives. These topics are David's starting point — not his ceiling.

01

Every Day Counts

David shares the mindset and daily disciplines that drove him from walk-on hopeful to All-American — and how your team can adopt the same relentless, intentional approach to every single day.

02

Faith, Family, Football

A talk about priorities, purpose, and what happens when life forces you to redefine success. Grounding your career and your character in what truly matters.

03

Overcoming Adversity & Leadership

From a career-ending injury to building a national media career, David shares the framework for turning setbacks into comebacks — and how real leaders respond when the stakes are highest.

04

Encouraged by Faith

A faith-based keynote on finding hope, strength, and purpose through life's hardest seasons. David speaks openly about the role faith has played in every chapter of his story.

05

Winning Mindset

The mental frameworks that separate good from great. Lessons drawn from the football field, the broadcast booth, and the moments in between that nobody sees.

06

Custom Topic

David works directly with event organizers to craft a message tailored to your audience, your mission, and your moment. Every speech is built for the room it's in.

Book David
